description_long: This is a medium-sized, cylindrical black metal bucket with a slightly tapered body and a reinforced rim. The surface is dark and glossy, showing signs of wear and subtle metallic reflections, suggesting it is made of steel or iron. A prominent metal bail handle is attached to the upper rim with two visible riveted brackets, allowing for easy carrying. The bucket features two horizontal reinforcement bands, one near the top and one around the middle, providing structural strength. The interior appears hollow and dark, indicating it is empty and ready for use as a receptacle. There are no visible labels, markings, or decorative elements, giving it a utilitarian, industrial appearance suitable for urban or construction environments.
description: A glossy black metal bucket with a bail handle and reinforced bands, showing a utilitarian, industrial look. The surface is worn and reflective, with no visible markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bail handle attachment and riveted brackets clearly, with the glossy black surface and upper reinforcement band visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the smooth, uninterrupted cylindrical body and the continuous upper rim, with the handle ends just visible at the sides.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the opposite side of the handle attachment and the bucket's taper, with the reinforcement bands and glossy finish.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the handle ends visible, focusing on the bucket's clean, unmarked surface and structural bands.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal reinforcement bands at rim and midsection
